feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How can I auto close the MM & FI Period in SAP Hana 1709?
entry.content:
We have a requirement that at the end of every month we need to close the MM & FI period with some scheduler but the same period should be open for the specific users (i.e. Finance & Accounts team members) which again to be closed on 8th of every month.

Is there any default configuration available in SAP?

entry.title: Questions about the S/4HANA build process
entry.content:
Question.
I am currently looking to build an on-premise environment (TDD version) of S/4 HANA for our company, but we are having trouble understanding the steps to build it.
In the service license document, it says to create a license key and download the software from Manage My Services, but I don't know what license key and software correspond to the service (SAP Test and Demo User, starter package) that is currently activated.
I also do not know how to use the license key, so I would appreciate it if you could tell me how to use it.

Current status
I have a contract with SAP Test and Demo User, starter package (TD_7016852),
I am trying to build TDD version of S/4HANA on-prem environment.
I am using SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15 SP 6 as the operating system and have the environment to install the software.

I am also trying things out about the license key and software,
The license key is
Product of Installation Number : SAP S/4 HANA
Add New System
Product SAP S/4 HANA
Version SAP S/4 HANA, on-premise edition 1511
as a license key.

In addition, as the software
SAP S/4 HANA / SAP S/4 HANA 2023/
SAP HANA PLATFORM EDITION 2.0 (INSTALLATIONS AND UPGRADES)
I am trying to install the software.

I have already confirmed that I can download the software from the SAP Download Manager regarding the software installation.
I would greatly appreciate it if someone could give me an answer to my question.

entry.title: Rejection/ Reminder for RFQ's via Fiori using BRF+ output management
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in SAP fiori where one of the requirement is to send reminder/rejection email to suppliers for RFQ. It seems that this is not a standard functionality. 

 

Therefore, we thought about setting the output type in dispatch time 2 (scheduled) and try to force the sending by clicking on send output in application"Manage RFQ". The button remain grayed out and the status is either in preparation or to be output even after trying to use the app manage output items.

 

Is there any solution to force reminder/rejection email sending to suppliers?

entry.title: How to plan configurable material in pMRP
entry.content:
I am trying to plan configurable material in pMRP. Have done all required setting of strategy  groups to planning BOM. Maintained inactive PIR also but I am getting below waring message and job is getting failed.

Please suggest.

entry.title: Possible to enter Business Partner order address as vendor in purchasing document
entry.content:
We have different business partners for regular vendors and for contact persons that only serve as an ordering address (if it deviates from the regular vendor).

These business partners are linked via customer/vendor integration with different vendor account groups.

The account group that is assigned to the ordering address business partners is not configured to be entered as a vendor in a purchasing document.

Nevertheless, this is still possible (which we don't want).

How can we prevent Business Partner Address being entered as a Delivery Address in the PO?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Cleansing case error stating Duplicate cleansing not active for D BUPA
entry.content:
After Creating a Duplicate Record in SAP S/4 Hana MDG system, I'm trying to create a cleansing case for the Duplicate Records but I am facing an Error Stating 'Duplicate cleansing not active for D BUPA'.

After clicking the Display Help and Followed the procedure as per the Display Help, But still the same Error is persisted.

Anyone can Help me with this.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Data issue in Standard CDS view 2CCFIFINSTMTKPI
entry.content:
Hi,

We have created dashboard on the standard CDS view 2CCFIFINSTMTKPI in SAC. We are facing a strange issue where EBITDA is not matching in 2 charts. The global currency is showing same as AUD.

Left chart- EBITDA (EBITDAAmountInGlobCrcy) is showing EBITDA value

Right chart-Amount in Global Currency (AmountInGlobalCurrency) is showing values for G/L account hierarchy, here we have selected EBITDA in the filter. So now, the chart show EBITDA value.

Ideally, these 2 charts should match with each other. The left chart value is matching with S/4.

entry.title: Implementation Single Sign-On for Web UIs for S/4HANA Cloud private edition
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Could you please assist me by providing detailed step-by-step guide documents for implementing Single Sign-On for Web UIs, specifically for option 5 mentioned below?

I have SAP IAS

entry.title: In ME22N when advance amount is changed in PO Release strategy is not re triggering for re-release.
Purchase Order Cancelled form template in S4HANA system
entry.content:
I would like to know PO cancelled template is available in S4HANA system like SAP ByDesign.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Unable to pass Debited account into BAPI_PAYMENTREQUEST_CREATE
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We are creating payment requests programmatically using the BAPI_PAYMENTREQUEST_CREATE to update the table PAYRQ. However, we are unable to update the debited account for the payment requests to the table PAYRQC-KONTO since there is no parameter in the BAPI to pass this information. 

 

Is there any way that the debited account can be updated for payment requests programmatically?

 

 

 

Regards,

entry.title: PM Order operation list
entry.content:
Hello.
I have an issue about PM order operation list.
The user wants to add the operations in the notification from a catalog.
These operations from the catalog have to integrate to the order's operation.
Our first solution is using the "Tasks" in the notification. We wanted to use the "Tasks" with its catalog, then we tried to find the order operation list's changing function.
So, we try to find the alternative solution for the requirement.

Looking forward your solutions.
Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Need to define Ledger Group HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Members ,

We have received one requirement in public cloud  " Define Group ledger " functionality.

Currently in Private cloud we are using Group ledger functionality and Group ledger assigned to our Local Accounting principal and client want to use same functionality in Public cloud.

Our client requirement is "  ledgers in our public cloud system where leading ledger should be 0L and assigned to Accounting principle US GAAP and wanted to create another ledger group LG which consists of two ledgers R1 and L1 where R1 should be the representative ledger in the group and L1 Should be non-representative ledger and this ledger group LG should be assigned to accounting principle Local GAAP.

Could you pls help us how we can achieve in HANA Public cloud ?

 

 

 

Thank you 

JP

entry.title: Find Fiori-App Equivalent to SAP GUI Report S_ALR_87013015
entry.content:
Good day Experts,
i am Looking for the Fiori-App equivalent to the SAP GUI report S_ALR_87013015 (Belastung / Entlastung --> Actual Debit/Crédit).
Despite searching the SAP Fiori Library, I was unable to locate an exact match. Could you please guide me on how to identify the corresponding Fiori-App for this report?
Is there a mapping table or reference that links SAP GUI reports to their equivalents in SAP Fiori-Apps?

Thx
Pat

entry.title: MRP Live MD01N is creating planned orders with duplicate materials
entry.content:
Hi 
We are facing duplicate material appearing in the planned orders as a result of MRP Live MD01N.
We have run on all materials and only problem occurred in few materials while the master data is same for all.
We tried our best but could not find out the reason for duplicated materials.

entry.title: Can I create Adaptation Project from my custom Fiori element (Analytic List Report Template) ?
entry.content:
Hi,
 I have created my new custom Fiori Element Application that uses Analytic List Report Template
My new custom application is deployed on SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud Edition
Then, I try to use BAS to create a new Adaptation Project to extend my custom Fiori Element app
but I cannot find my custom Fiori Element App on the list to select
Is there anything I need to configure my app before making it in a project type of cloudReady?
or make it available on the selection list

Thank you,
Pakorn

entry.title: SAP DRC & S/4HANA: Do I also need Ariba Central Invoice Mgmt. to process a supplier invoice to MIRO?
entry.content:
We want to connect the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (Cloud Edition) to S/4HANA (on Premise) for the implementation of E-Invoicing.

When we receive a supplier invoice via DRC: Can it automatically be transferred to the S/4HANA system and processed with proposal values for a MIRO posting?

Or do we need the Ariba Central Invoice Management as an additional tool?

 

Thank you & best regards

Janni

entry.title: For standard Subcontracting Process, how to link Subcon PO with it's corresponding Subcon Challan?
PRs created from MRP can be mass released in ME55 manually
entry.content:
We faced an issue, A PR that is in Hand Over process can still be approved using ME55 transaction. If the same PR is adopted into a PO, it will trigger an error PR is in process. However, if the PO is hold, the PR cannot be removed from the PO because of the same error. 

  • Generate a PR from MRP that requires Hand Over
  • Approve the PR using ME55
  • Adopt the PR into a PO
  • Click Hold
  • Edit the Held PO, and try deleting the line item. Held PO cannot be saved due to the error.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Extend Validity of E-Waybill
entry.content:
How to extend the validity of E-Waybill?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
